TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Pnegalang alang = Uuda nii ga, rahuq na dmayaw phiyug he-cwo-se ni gmbarah smalu bbrigan, ida measug pghiyi pusu qhuni, smalu saan pkdngu drisa, ida kmbiyax bi smikul ssaan rmigaw alang uri. Mseupu ka dha snluan "tru tgbasi" pdaun rgrigan, ida niqan ka lmamu ning-mung, risah ni musa tlamay smbu buji, pgkla endaan tnealang alang Gluban Yu-seng ci-neyn-kwan, qnrpuhan empgrig tnealang, phapuy quri tru tgbasi uqan seejiq tnpusu, qmamas nana risah, qmita risah ka dowriq, mkksa ka lnglungan ni musa tlamay tminun pala dnii, ida tduwa mtlamay nniqan alang ka emprigaw. Bnarah smnalu uda nii ga, tay saw pnegalang tnealang o tduwa paah mhuma bitaq snluan, ida tduwa kndadax biyax nanaq kana pdanga tnsapah, iyux pkrana ngalan dha ka emptxgal. Smulu mkala ka qnpahan sbiyaw, ida uxay wana mrana ka ngalan sntkuan hbangan, musa egu ka bnarah qqpahun, tduwan meiyah alang ni qmeepah nanaq nniqan alang ka seejiq tnealang. Sayang dga quri smnalu risah, ning-mung ni tgibu tru mtgbasi pnegalang nii ga, wada dha brahun mataru uuqun da, saw ka syaw-su tru tgbasi, risah cu, tgibu cu, ning-mung cu, mdngu ning-mu, risah snqrngal mqalux dnii, ida wada prajing bbarig da wah; Duri ni gmburah wang-can teyn-c sang-wu ping-tay, spuun elug rrigan, bnarah kndusan ni tqian dnii, qmita bnatas ni snkrayan ka emprigaw sjiqan do asi leexan mkla da. Yaasa Jen-ay-syang Hu-cu-cun na alang Gluban, alang Maapu ni Sin-seng-cun na alang Bgala ga, ida niqan egu pnegalang ni suyang bi knkla kndusan rdrudan sbiyaw; Niqan hangan ssan rmigaw saw ka Hwey-sun rin-cang, Tay-ya tu-cya-cun ni Yu-seng ci-neyn- kwan dnii; Manu ka smnalu pnegalang tru tgbasi Tnealang Hu-Sin ksun ga, ida niqan bi brihan na quri saw stkuan hbangan, dmudul kana alang ni pktutuy endaan rdrudan sbiyaw. Pnyahan bnatas Empmatas:Lituk Teymu Jiyax: Hngkwasan 2023
S.PHON: = pn…ôgalaŇč alaŇč = uuda nii ga, …ĺańßuq na dmajaw pńßijug ńß…ô- ¶wo-s…ô ni gmba…ĺańß smalu bb…ĺigan, ida m…ôasug pgńßiji pusu qńßuni, smalu saan pkdŇču d…ĺisa, ida kmbijax bi smikul ssaan …ĺmigaw alaŇč u…ĺi. ms…ôupu ka dńßa snluan "t…ĺu tgbasi" pdaun …ĺg…ĺigan, ida niqan ka lmamu niŇč-muŇč, …ĺisańß ni musa tlamaj smbu bu…üi, pgkla …ôndaan tn…ôalaŇč alaŇč gluban ju-s…ôŇč ¶i-n…ôn-kwan, qn…ĺpuńßan …ômpg…ĺig tn…ôalaŇč, pńßapuj qu…ĺi t…ĺu tgbasi uqan s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu, qmamas nana …ĺisańß, qmita …ĺisańß ka dow…ĺiq, mkksa ka lŇčluŇčan ni musa tlamaj tminun pala dnii, ida tduwa mtlamaj nniqan alaŇč ka …ômp…ĺigaw. bna…ĺańß smnalu uda nii ga, taj saw pn…ôgalaŇč tn…ôalaŇč o tduwa paańß mńßuma bitaq snluan, ida tduwa kndadax bijax nanaq kana pdaŇča tnsapańß, ijux pk…ĺana Ňčalan dńßa ka …ômptxgal. smulu mkala ka qnpańßan sbijaw, ida uxaj wana m…ĺana ka Ňčalan sntkuan ńßbaŇčan, musa …ôgu ka bna…ĺańß qqpańßun, tduwan m…ôijańß alaŇč ni qm…ô…ôpańß nanaq nniqan alaŇč ka s…ô…ô…üiq tn…ôalaŇč. sajaŇč dga qu…ĺi smnalu …ĺisańß, niŇč-muŇč ni tgibu t…ĺu mtgbasi pn…ôgalaŇč nii ga, wada dńßa b…ĺańßun mata…ĺu uuqun da, saw ka sjaw-su t…ĺu tgbasi, …ĺisańß ¶u, tgibu ¶u, niŇč-muŇč ¶u, mdŇču niŇč-mu, …ĺisańß snq…ĺŇčal mqalux dnii, ida wada p…ĺa…üiŇč bba…ĺig da wańß; du…ĺi ni gmbu…ĺańß waŇč- ¶an t…ôn- ¶ saŇč-wu piŇč-taj, spuun …ôlug …ĺ…ĺigan, bna…ĺańß kndusan ni tqian dnii, qmita bnatas ni snk…ĺajan ka …ômp…ĺigaw s…üiqan do asi l…ô…ôxan mkla da. jaasa …ü…ôn-aj-sjaŇč ńßu- ¶u- ¶un na alaŇč gluban, alaŇč maapu ni sin-s…ôŇč- ¶un na alaŇč bgala ga, ida niqan …ôgu pn…ôgalaŇč ni sujaŇč bi knkla kndusan …ĺd…ĺudan sbijaw; niqan ńßaŇčan ssan …ĺmigaw saw ka ńßw…ô-sun …ĺin- ¶aŇč, taj-ja tu- ¶ja- ¶un ni ju-s…ôŇč ¶i-n…ôn- kwan dnii; manu ka smnalu pn…ôgalaŇč t…ĺu tgbasi tn…ôalaŇč ńßu-sin ksun ga, ida niqan bi b…ĺińßan na qu…ĺi saw stkuan ńßbaŇčan, dmudul kana alaŇč ni pktutuj …ôndaan …ĺd…ĺudan sbijaw. pnjańßan bnatas …ômpmatas:lituk t…ômu …üijax: ńßŇčkwasan ****
S.FORM: = Pnegalang alang = Uuda nii ga, rahuq na dmayaw phiyug he-cwo-se ni gmbarah smalu bbrigan, ida measug pghiyi pusu qhuni, smalu saan pkdngu drisa, ida kmbiyax bi smikul ssaan rmigaw alang uri. Mseupu ka dha snluan "tru tgbasi" pdaun rgrigan, ida niqan ka lmamu ning-mung, risah ni musa tlamay smbu buji, pgkla endaan tnealang alang Gluban Yu-seng ci-neyn-kwan, qnrpuhan empgrig tnealang, phapuy quri tru tgbasi uqan seejiq tnpusu, qmamas nana risah, qmita risah ka dowriq, mkksa ka lnglungan ni musa tlamay tminun pala dnii, ida tduwa mtlamay nniqan alang ka emprigaw. Bnarah smnalu uda nii ga, tay saw pnegalang tnealang o tduwa paah mhuma bitaq snluan, ida tduwa kndadax biyax nanaq kana pdanga tnsapah, iyux pkrana ngalan dha ka emptxgal. Smulu mkala ka qnpahan sbiyaw, ida uxay wana mrana ka ngalan sntkuan hbangan, musa egu ka bnarah qqpahun, tduwan meiyah alang ni qmeepah nanaq nniqan alang ka seejiq tnealang. Sayang dga quri smnalu risah, ning-mung ni tgibu tru mtgbasi pnegalang nii ga, wada dha brahun mataru uuqun da, saw ka syaw-su tru tgbasi, risah cu, tgibu cu, ning-mung cu, mdngu ning-mu, risah snqrngal mqalux dnii, ida wada prajing bbarig da wah; Duri ni gmburah wang-can teyn-c sang-wu ping-tay, spuun elug rrigan, bnarah kndusan ni tqian dnii, qmita bnatas ni snkrayan ka emprigaw sjiqan do asi leexan mkla da. Yaasa Jen-ay-syang Hu-cu-cun na alang Gluban, alang Maapu ni Sin-seng-cun na alang Bgala ga, ida niqan egu pnegalang ni suyang bi knkla kndusan rdrudan sbiyaw; Niqan hangan ssan rmigaw saw ka Hwey-sun rin-cang, Tay-ya tu-cya-cun ni Yu-seng ci-neyn- kwan dnii; Manu ka smnalu pnegalang tru tgbasi Tnealang Hu-Sin ksun ga, ida niqan bi brihan na quri saw stkuan hbangan, dmudul kana alang ni pktutuy endaan rdrudan sbiyaw. Pnyahan bnatas Empmatas:Lituk Teymu Jiyax: Hngkwasan 2023
S.PHON: = pn…ôgalaŇč alaŇč = uuda nii ga, …ĺańßuq na dmajaw pńßijug ńß…ô- ¶wo-s…ô ni gmba…ĺańß smalu bb…ĺigan, ida m…ôasug pgńßiji pusu qńßuni, smalu saan pkdŇču d…ĺisa, ida kmbijax bi smikul ssaan …ĺmigaw alaŇč u…ĺi. ms…ôupu ka dńßa snluan "t…ĺu tgbasi" pdaun …ĺg…ĺigan, ida niqan ka lmamu niŇč-muŇč, …ĺisańß ni musa tlamaj smbu bu…üi, pgkla …ôndaan tn…ôalaŇč alaŇč gluban ju-s…ôŇč ¶i-n…ôn-kwan, qn…ĺpuńßan …ômpg…ĺig tn…ôalaŇč, pńßapuj qu…ĺi t…ĺu tgbasi uqan s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu, qmamas nana …ĺisańß, qmita …ĺisańß ka dow…ĺiq, mkksa ka lŇčluŇčan ni musa tlamaj tminun pala dnii, ida tduwa mtlamaj nniqan alaŇč ka …ômp…ĺigaw. bna…ĺańß smnalu uda nii ga, taj saw pn…ôgalaŇč tn…ôalaŇč o tduwa paańß mńßuma bitaq snluan, ida tduwa kndadax bijax nanaq kana pdaŇča tnsapańß, ijux pk…ĺana Ňčalan dńßa ka …ômptxgal. smulu mkala ka qnpańßan sbijaw, ida uxaj wana m…ĺana ka Ňčalan sntkuan ńßbaŇčan, musa …ôgu ka bna…ĺańß qqpańßun, tduwan m…ôijańß alaŇč ni qm…ô…ôpańß nanaq nniqan alaŇč ka s…ô…ô…üiq tn…ôalaŇč. sajaŇč dga qu…ĺi smnalu …ĺisańß, niŇč-muŇč ni tgibu t…ĺu mtgbasi pn…ôgalaŇč nii ga, wada dńßa b…ĺańßun mata…ĺu uuqun da, saw ka sjaw-su t…ĺu tgbasi, …ĺisańß ¶u, tgibu ¶u, niŇč-muŇč ¶u, mdŇču niŇč-mu, …ĺisańß snq…ĺŇčal mqalux dnii, ida wada p…ĺa…üiŇč bba…ĺig da wańß; du…ĺi ni gmbu…ĺańß waŇč- ¶an t…ôn- ¶ saŇč-wu piŇč-taj, spuun …ôlug …ĺ…ĺigan, bna…ĺańß kndusan ni tqian dnii, qmita bnatas ni snk…ĺajan ka …ômp…ĺigaw s…üiqan do asi l…ô…ôxan mkla da. jaasa …ü…ôn-aj-sjaŇč ńßu- ¶u- ¶un na alaŇč gluban, alaŇč maapu ni sin-s…ôŇč- ¶un na alaŇč bgala ga, ida niqan …ôgu pn…ôgalaŇč ni sujaŇč bi knkla kndusan …ĺd…ĺudan sbijaw; niqan ńßaŇčan ssan …ĺmigaw saw ka ńßw…ô-sun …ĺin- ¶aŇč, taj-ja tu- ¶ja- ¶un ni ju-s…ôŇč ¶i-n…ôn- kwan dnii; manu ka smnalu pn…ôgalaŇč t…ĺu tgbasi tn…ôalaŇč ńßu-sin ksun ga, ida niqan bi b…ĺińßan na qu…ĺi saw stkuan ńßbaŇčan, dmudul kana alaŇč ni pktutuj …ôndaan …ĺd…ĺudan sbijaw. pnjańßan bnatas …ômpmatas:lituk t…ômu …üijax: ńßŇčkwasan ****
